instagram_spots.name: Duomo51
highlights: Rooftop terrace with skyline views
Authentic Italian flavors
Wine selection
Sunset dining experience
instagram_spots.notes: Great for date night or special occasion

instagram_spots.name: Sawada Coffee (inside Au Cheval)
highlights: Tokyo-style black sugar syrup drinks
Matcha espresso military lattes
Located in one of few alleys in Manhattan
Inside Au Cheval restaurant
instagram_spots.notes: Must-try: Tokyo style black sugar syrup

instagram_spots.name: The Domino Room
highlights: Wraparound terrace
Located above a café
Good for drinks with friends
Food served inside only
instagram_spots.notes: New spot on UES

instagram_spots.name: The Bar at Baccarat Hotel
highlights: One of the most stunning bars in NYC
Perfect for drinks dates
Great for out-of-town visitors
Upscale Baccarat crystal setting
instagram_spots.notes: Luxury hotel bar, dress appropriately

instagram_spots.name: The Club Room
highlights: Live jazz club that transitions to nightclub
Hotel lounge for chill nights
Great date night spot
Located in a SoHo hotel
instagram_spots.notes: Known as nightclub but worth visiting for the jazz club / lounge side

instagram_spots.name: Opera House NYC
highlights: Asian-inspired speakeasy
In an old opera house / first Chinese theater in NYC
Tea and herb-infused cocktails
Dim sum bites
Underneath Chinese Tuxedo
instagram_spots.notes: Located underneath Chinese Tuxedo restaurant

instagram_spots.name: The Back Room NYC
highlights: True Prohibition-era speakeasy
One of two in NYC serving since Prohibition
Drinks served in teacups
Live jazz on Mondays 9pm–12:30am
Time machine atmosphere
instagram_spots.notes: ⚠️ CASH ONLY

instagram_spots.name: Fonty's Deli Dukaan
highlights: Indian-style sandwiches
Naanini (panini chicken tikka)
Bombay sandwich with Amul cheese
Worth the line
Second location in Dumbo
instagram_spots.notes: 10/10 rating. Long line but worth it.

instagram_spots.name: Bar Behind Cafe Select
highlights: Hidden speakeasy behind a café
One of the classic NYC speakeasies
Great atmosphere

instagram_spots.name: The Ainsworth
highlights: One of the best happy hours in NYC
Beautiful rooftop
Disco seltzer buckets
Half off appetizers

instagram_spots.name: Barnjoo 35
highlights: Soju flights
Korean food and drinks
Great K-Town vibe
instagram_spots.notes: Go for the soju flight!

instagram_spots.name: The Roof at PUBLIC Hotel (Igloos)

Skyline views from downtown to Empire State Building
One of NYC's coziest winter traditions
Cocktails and light bites inside heated domes
instagram_spots.notes: Seasonal — winter only. Great for date night or festive gatherings.

instagram_spots.name: StEight
highlights: Hidden Japanese speakeasy in Chinatown
Super small and intimate
Vinyl records playing
Japanese cultural touches throughout
4.9/5 stars (60+ reviews)
instagram_spots.notes: Must-try: ICHIGO ICHIEI (strawberry drink with matcha from Kyoto)

instagram_spots.name: Boucherie

Great French onion soup
Near West Village Christmas decorations
Grab hot chocolate across the street after dinner

instagram_spots.name: Death & Co

Healing / therapeutic cocktail vibes
Great for drinks with friends

instagram_spots.name: The Morgan Library & Museum

Reservations required (tickets released 1 week in advance)
Live music begins at 5pm
Stunning library interior

google_maps_spots.name: INDN Small Plates & Cocktails
highlights: Experience handcrafted cocktails, flavorful Indian food, and small plates in a luxurious setting. INDN offers bold flavors and signature drinks in the heart of Manhattan.

google_maps_spots.name: Emmett's on Grove
highlights: Emmett's on Grove is a midwest inspired supper club specializing in tavern style pizza. Following the success of his Soho institution, Emmett's, owner Emmett Burke longed to create a space exclusively showcasing Chicago's lesser known but hometown favorite pizza: tavern style thin crust.

google_maps_spots.name: Aimé Leon Dore
highlights: Clothing store / Cafe
Price varies

google_maps_spots.name: Chinese Tuxedo
highlights: Best NYC Restaurants, Chinese, Modern Asian Food, Chinatown, Cocktails, Late Night, Fine Dining, Manhattan, Banquet, Private Dining, Upscale Restaurant, Private Events Chinese Tuxedo NYC, New York City: See 149 unbiased reviews of Chinese Tuxedo NYC, rated 4.2 of 5 on Tripadvisor and ranked #1,382 of 8,925 restaurants in New York City. 3.9 (622 reviews) Claimed $$$ Chinese, Seafood, Noodles Closed 5:00 PM - 11:00 PM See hours See all 1.4k photos Chinese Tuxedo, located in New York City, offers a trendy dining experience with a diverse menu of noodles, Chinese dishes, and seafood options.

google_maps_spots.name: Kyuramen - Union Square
highlights: Kyuramen Union Square offers authentic Japanese ramen in New York's Union Square area. Specialties: A New Japanese style ramen place in Union Square, NYC.

google_maps_spots.name: Best Bagel & Coffee
highlights: NEW YORK CITY'S TOP RATED BAGEL STORE Step into Best Bagel Coffee and Enjoy the Ultimate Bagel Experience Best Bagel and Coffee specializes in offering hand-rolled bagels baked daily on the premises with all-natural flavors. Specialties: Fresh hand rolled bagels with variety of cream cheeses.

google_maps_spots.name: Fonty’s Deli + Dukaan
highlights: "We are obsessed with sandwiches," said Varsha Harlalka, one of three co-founders of the charming new Fonty's Deli and Dukaan on Christopher Street, along with her husband Arjun Gupta and their friend Viraj Borkar. She said her husband Arjun grew up in Tampa, Florida, "eating tons of sandwiches," while she and Viraj grew up in Assam, India, also eating a lot of sandwiches, but very different ...

google_maps_spots.name: The Best Sichuan
highlights: The Best Sichuan, a Chinese restaurant with typical Sichuan cuisine, located near Time Square at 47 W 39th Street, New York, NY10018, opened recently. The restaurant was renovated thoroughly according to a modern luxury medium sized restaurant in a metropolis.

google_maps_spots.name: Devoción
highlights: Specialties: Farm-to-table coffee roasters. We average 10 days from origin to roast, serving the freshest coffee imaginable.

google_maps_spots.name: Osteria Delbianco
highlights: Osteria Delbianco offers an intimate, white-tablecloth dining room with closely spaced tables and a lively bar area. The owner notes private-party capability (they accept private events), though the restaurant does not take very large parties.

google_maps_spots.name: Rubirosa
highlights: Rubirosa is located in the heart of Nolita and its clientele bridges the gap between the old and new neighborhood regulars. Rubirosa's homey and comfortable atmosphere welcomes every occasion!

google_maps_spots.name: Ambra
highlights: Italian restaurant in West Village NYC serves handmade pasta, wood-fired pizza, and premium wines. Private event spaces are available for special gatherings.

google_maps_spots.name: Darling
highlights: Escape to Darling—an intimate rooftop oasis above Central Park. Sip signature cocktails, enjoy curated entertainment, and soak in stunning New York views.

google_maps_spots.name: A10 Kitchen
highlights: Specialties: Costumer service, our unique food and crafted cocktails all the time. Also we have the best happy hour in NyC.

google_maps_spots.name: Adda
highlights: Reservations *For all reservations of 7 and more, please visit our private dining page. Once located in Queens, this restaurant by Unapologetic Foods has found a new home in the East Village.

google_maps_spots.name: A Side Pizza & Pasta Bar
highlights: Discover A Side Pizza Pasta Bar in Hell's Kitchen, NYC, for fresh pasta, flavorful personal pizzas, standout chicken Parmesan, and vibrant cocktails. Enjoy great service, affordable prices, and unbeatable happy hour deals in a modern, friendly setting.

google_maps_spots.name: Rosetta Bakery
highlights: From the moment you walk into Rosetta Bakery, you can tell it's more than just another café—it's a vibrant New York stop that brings authentic Italian bakery vibes straight to the Upper West Side. Whether you're grabbing breakfast before work, meeting a friend for coffee, or stopping by for a savory lunch, this place consistently delivers delicious food, great drinks, and a welcoming ...

google_maps_spots.name: Ellen's Stardust Diner
highlights: Welcome to Ellen's Stardust Diner - home of the world famous singing waiters - serving Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner for tour groups & locals alike since 1987! A singing waitstaff is only part of the fun at this 1950s-themed Times Square restaurant, which packs folks in for food and entertainment.

google_maps_spots.name: Lantern
highlights: La Lanterna, located in New York City, NY, offers a lantern-lit indoor garden and live jazz in the adjoining bar to complement light Italian fare italian cafe-coffee shop La Lanterna di Vittorio Home Valentine's Day Gift Cards Reservations Menus Bar Next Door Prix Fixe Menu Pricing Selected Views & Reviews Contact 129 MacDougal St New York NY 10012 Phone: (917) 639-3236 Phone: (212) 529-5945 Fax: (212) 981-2731 About La Lanterna di Vittorio Greenwich village cafe established in 1977 by Carlo Vittorio Antonini features 12 types of lasagna, full bar, fine Italian pastries, espresso by Cafe Domino and a Wine Spectator awarded wine list. DINING About - Dining Experience fine dining of Italian cuisine with a Swiss twist Thank you for joining us at La Lanterna as we enter our 30+ year anniversary of serving excellent food to share with our wonderful guests.

google_maps_spots.name: Lilly's Cocktail and Wine
highlights: 4.1 (221 reviews) Claimed $$ New American, Wine Bars, Cocktail Bars Closed 11:00 AM - 10:00 PM See hours See all 268 photos From the owners of Lilly's Craft and Kitchen in Hell's Kitchen, Lilly's Cocktail and Wine is a sophisticated yet casual, comfy locale offering wines by the glass & tapas-style Italian bites. Stop in and taste our noteworthy desserts, try out our comfort food, or enjoy happy hour in a hip environment.

google_maps_spots.name: Veeray da Dhaba
highlights: Welcome to Veeray da Dhaba, New York City's first Punjabi dhaba by Michelin-starred Chef Hemant Mathur. Located in the heart of the East Village, VDD brings the soulful flavors of traditional Indian roadside cuisine to NYC — rich curries, aromatic tandoori specialties, slow-cooked dals, and beloved Punjabi classics served in a welcoming, casual setting.

google_maps_spots.name: Mughlai Grill
highlights: Come to Mughali and enjoy a wide variety of delicious Indian cuisine including vegetarian and non-vegetarian appetizers, soups and beverages. We cook with halal meats!

google_maps_spots.name: Kebab aur Sharab
highlights: Specialties: BAB और one LBAB, At Kebab and Sharab we aim to offer our patrons an experience; a true culinary journey, capturing the opulence of age-old traditions and of one of the oldest known culinary heritages in the World: India! The Indian Culture is full of patterns, colors, and emotions.

google_maps_spots.name: Tomi Jazz
highlights: " We ordered 2 different croquettes, an omurice and the cod roe pasta, which was actually decently portioned. " in 73 reviews " Behind a fairly nondescript door is an intimate, relaxing, dimly lit restaurant/bar with great music playing.

google_maps_spots.name: The Mean Fiddler
highlights: The Mean Fiddler in New York, NY, The Mean Fiddler delivers the full NYC experience, music, drinks, and an atmosphere built for making memories right in the middle of the city that never sleeps. Reserve a table at The Mean Fiddler, New York City on Tripadvisor: See 1,179 unbiased reviews of The Mean Fiddler, rated 4.5 of 5 on Tripadvisor and ranked #202 of 8,925 restaurants in New York City.

google_maps_spots.name: Cafe Luce – Italian Restaurant & Wine Bar
highlights: Discover the ultimate italian restaurant Midtown East NYC near grand central! Relish fresh pasta and curated wines at Cafe Luce, the italian restaurant near grand central.

google_maps_spots.name: Taqueria On Tenth
highlights: Book now at Taqueria on Tenth in New York, NY. Explore menu, see photos and read 17 reviews: "First time diner.

google_maps_spots.name: WOK IN THE CLOUDS
highlights: Wok In The Clouds in Midtown NYC serves bold Asian-Indian fusion with noodles, tandoori, momos, and lobster. Order online or dine in near Flatiron.

google_maps_spots.name: Darbar Grill
highlights: Darbar Grill in Midtown East features upscale Indian cuisine for lunch and dinner. Darbar is a recommended restaurant for fine Indian food, serving delicious Indian lunch specials and upscale Indian menu at dinner in Midtown Manhattan.

google_maps_spots.name: Semma
highlights: From the team behind Unapologetic Foods (Dhamaka, Adda), Semma is a bold, clear-eyed expression of Southern Indian cuisine, rooted in the traditions of Tamil Nadu and brought to life by Chef Vijay Kumar. This is food drawn from memory, from farm life and family kitchens, from rituals rarely seen outside South India.

google_maps_spots.name: Patiala Indian Grill
highlights: The new Patiala Indian Grill and Bar is an authentic north and south Indian Cuisine in the heart of Penn station, Manhattan, serving with familiar fare includes many vegan and vegetarian options served with Royal Indian hospitality. Parties 20+ have to make 2 different bookings online depending on party size.

google_maps_spots.name: DILLI DILLI
highlights: Specialties: More than just a restaurant, Dilli Dilli is an experience—a vibrant journey through the rich flavors and culture of Old Delhi. From the warm, nostalgic ambiance to a menu that revives generations-old recipes, every bite tells a story.

google_maps_spots.name: Dhamaka
highlights: Dhamaka is an Unapologetic Foods restaurant celebrating the forgotten side of India. Located at Essex Market on the Lower East Side, Dhamaka dives deep into the bold, provincial cooking rarely seen outside of Indian homes and roadside stalls.

google_maps_spots.name: PHD Rooftop Lounge at Dream Downtown
highlights: Welcome to PHD Rooftop Lounge, one of NYC's most renown rooftops known for breathtaking views. Located on the 12th floor of the Dream Downtown.

google_maps_spots.name: Old Mates Pub
highlights: View Old Mates Pub at 170 John St, New York, NY 10038on Google Maps Main Content Starts Here, tab to start navigating Old Mates Pub | Australian Pub in New York, NY hero video paused, press to play videoPlaying hero video, press to pause video "The Real Aussie Embassy" An authentic Australian pub nestled in the historic heart of Downtown Manhattan. Experience authentic Australian pub culture in the heart of Downtown Manhattan at Old Mates Pub.

google_maps_spots.name: Bar Bonobo
highlights: Indulge in expertly crafted cocktails in our elegant cocktail lounge. Enjoy a wide selection of unique drinks and exquisite flavors.

google_maps_spots.name: Brooklyn Storehouse
highlights: Discover Brooklyn Storehouse, a versatile event space in the historic Brooklyn Navy Yard. Perfect for music, arts, and cultural events.

google_maps_spots.name: Harry's Side Bar
highlights: Harry's Side Bar is a Champagne Bar specializing in a diverse selection of bubbles, wine, aperitifs, and small plates. Perfect for after-work gatherings, cocktail receptions, date night, solo dining and weekend brunch, visit us on Stone Street in downtown Manhattan's Financial District.

google_maps_spots.name: Melody’s Piano Bar
highlights: Martignetti brothers, Tom and Anthony modernize the Upper East Side classic, Lexington Bar and Books with Melody's Piano Bar - a storied spot for storied brothers. 4.0 (75 reviews) Claimed Cocktail Bars, Jazz & Blues, Piano Bars Closed 5:00 PM - 4:00 AM (Next day) See hours See all 73 photos I recommend you to visit the restaurant Melody's Piano Bar.

google_maps_spots.name: The Red Lion | NYC
highlights: The Red Lion is the official home of Brentford FC in NYC, serving as the primary hub for Bees fans to catch every Premier League fixture live on Bleecker Street. Experience the most authentic West Village football atmosphere with fellow supporters, proper pints, and traditional pub food for every match.

google_maps_spots.name: JIMMY
highlights: JIMMY is a classic NYC Bar sits 18 stories above SoHo with panoramic views of Midtown. The area features a pool, conversation pit and freeform lounge.

google_maps_spots.name: Mr. Purple
highlights: Mr. Purple, a rooftop bar and restaurant located on the 15th floor of Hotel Indigo Lower East Side, captures the vibrant and artistic spirit of the LES.

google_maps_spots.name: Kind Regards
highlights: Specialties: Cocktails and house party vibes. With COVID closing our doors temporarily we've created a lil oasis in the LES, right on the street.

google_maps_spots.name: Pianos
highlights: Cargo GENERAL INQUIRIES: info@pianosnyc.com PRIVATE PARTIES: party@pianosnyc.com PERFORMER BOOKING: booking@pianosnyc.com DJ BOOKING: dj@pianosnyc.com ︎: (212) 505-3733 Specialties: Live music and great food Established in 2002. Pianos is kind of an entertainment multiplex.

google_maps_spots.name: Devoción
highlights: Specialties: Farm-to-table coffee roasters. We average 10 days from origin to roast, serving the freshest coffee imaginable.

google_maps_spots.name: Tipsy Nomad
highlights: Located in the heart of Manhattan's NoMad neighborhood, Tipsy NoMad NYC is a high-energy bar, restaurant, and lounge at 37 East 28th Street, New York, NY 10016. Known for craft cocktails, premium spirits, and elevated bar food, Tipsy NoMad offers a vibrant yet comfortable atmosphere for after-work drinks, game nights, and late-night gatherings.

google_maps_spots.name: Obvio
highlights: Discover Obvio, a chic cocktail bar in Nomad New York, known for its upscale drinks, stylish ambiance, and vibrant energy. Perfect for late-night cocktails, social gatherings, and unforgettable evenings in the heart of NYC.

google_maps_spots.name: The Fleur Room
highlights: Located on the 35th floor of Moxy Chelsea, The Fleur Room's glass-enclosed rooftop boasts unparalleled views of the NYC skyline and Empire State Building. The Fleur Room NYC, Casual Elegant Cocktail Bar cuisine.

google_maps_spots.name: The Delancey Rooftop
highlights: Everything about The Delancey rooftop bar in New York, NYC. Opening hours, booking link, dress code, pictures and much more.

google_maps_spots.name: Park Bar
highlights: Sunday* to Wednesday - 4:00 pm to 1:00 am Thursday to Saturday - 4:00 pm to 4:00 am Park Bar 19 E 15th Street at Union Square New York, NY 10003 Our other bar and private event space the Black Door at 127 W 26th St. is permanently closed.

google_maps_spots.name: Angel’s Share
highlights: 45 GROVE STREET // WEST VILLAGE, NYC ANGEL'S SHARE RULES (SINCE 1993) NO RESERVATIONS, WALK-IN ONLY, NO MORE THAN 4 PEOPLE/GROUP, NO STANDING NO SPLIT PARTIES OPEN FROM 5PM, CLOSED SUNDAYS & MONDAYS Follow us on Instagram for most updated information @angelssharenyc NOW HIRING: Host & Busser Please email at hello@angelssharenyc.com Angel's Share's original location materialized in a very different New York-only the savvy knew of its existence, let alone where to look for it. In 1993, Tony Yoshida opened Angel's Share and ushered in a new era for New York.

google_maps_spots.name: Le Bain
highlights: Le Bain is the penthouse discothèque and rooftop bar on the top floor of The Standard, High Line featuring world-famous DJs, a state-of-the-art sound system and exclamation-inspiring views. Everything about Le Bain & The Rooftop, arooftop bar in New York, NYC.

google_maps_spots.name: Sounds Of Brazil
highlights: About Us Sounds of Brazil, known as SOB's, is a legendary live music club in downtown Manhattan. Founded in 1982 by owner and director Larry Gold, SOB's was opened with a mission to amplify the musical wealth and heritage of the Afro-Latino Diaspora.

google_maps_spots.name: NOFLEX® NYC
highlights: NOFLEX® NYC is New York City's first-ever media art restaurant & cocktail bar, offering a truly immersive dining and drinking experience. Guests are surrounded by captivating visuals and digital art projected across a stunning 72-foot LED wall, creating an atmosphere that shifts with the rhythm of time and music.

google_maps_spots.name: Darling
highlights: Escape to Darling—an intimate rooftop oasis above Central Park. Sip signature cocktails, enjoy curated entertainment, and soak in stunning New York views.

google_maps_spots.name: Tile Bar
highlights: Tile Bar opened its doors in 1984. Tile Bar is an unpretentious East Village staple that has been open since the 1980s (back when the NYC bar scene was a lot different than what we see today).

google_maps_spots.name: A10 Kitchen
highlights: Specialties: Costumer service, our unique food and crafted cocktails all the time. Also we have the best happy hour in NyC.

google_maps_spots.name: Superbueno
highlights: MON-THUR: 4PM-2AM FRI-SUN: 2PM-2AM 13 1ST AVENUE, EAST VILLAGE, NYC 347-866-7739 Superbueno is located at 13 1st Avenue. It is open Monday through Friday, 4pm-2am, and 2pm-2am on Saturdays and Sundays.

google_maps_spots.name: One if by Land, Two if by Sea
highlights: One if by Land, Two if by Sea has been recognized for its classic menu, long history, and beautiful decor. It is often cited as the most romantic restaurant in New York City.

google_maps_spots.name: Bathtub Gin
highlights: A classic 1920's speakeasy with craft cocktails, a full dinner menu, and live entertainment. Located in New York City.

google_maps_spots.name: Blind Barber
highlights: Blind Barber East Village, New York City During the day, the action happens in the front shop, where local barbers maneuver around antique barber chairs, giving East Villagers cuts and trims with a price that includes a free drink. By night, the lights dim, the candles come out and expertly crafted cocktails and dance tunes fill the hidden bar.

google_maps_spots.name: Beauty & Essex
highlights: Beauty & Essex New York has an innovative design that starts in the entrance, and Chef Chris Santos' cuisine is intended to set a new course. Beauty & Essex- New York, Casual Elegant Unspecified cuisine.

google_maps_spots.name: UES.
highlights: The East Pole is a consistently crowded restaurant on the Upper East Side that works for everything from date nights to fun group dinners, but the bar area up front is also useful when you're just looking for drinks. The Best Upper East Side Restaurants, According to Eater Editors From revived French prix fixe to Thai fast-casual, here's where to go on the Upper East Side The very best bars on the Upper East Side From neighborhood pubs to smart cocktail bars, these are the best Upper East Side bars in New York City.

google_maps_spots.name: Five Guys
highlights: Browse all Five Guys restaurants in New York, New York. Our fresh burgers are cooked to perfection and don't forget to add our famous hand-cut fries and your favourite shake.

google_maps_spots.name: Chapel Bar
highlights: Chapel Bar is open for evening cocktails Thursday through Saturday from 5 pm until late. " A new social spot that's a bit sacrilegious in all the right ways.

google_maps_spots.name: McNally Jackson Books Seaport
highlights: Discover McNally Jackson Coffee & Wine Bar at 4 Fulton Street, a cozy and trendy cafe located within the iconic McNally Jackson Books. Offering a great selection of coffee and tea, alongside a curated list of wine and beer, it's the perfect spot to relax with a book or meet a friend.

google_maps_spots.name: Wharf Dr
highlights: NYC.com information, maps, directions and reviews on The Wharf and other in New York City. NYC.com, the authentic city site, also offer a comprehensive Bars & Music section.
